principle: Use one GPU-heavy local model at a time. Treat ComfyUI as the primary VRAM owner during image generation. Keep orchestration rule-based unless the user explicitly asks for more automation.

constraints: Use only when ComfyUI is closed or idle and free VRAM is above the 8B threshold.
Do not keep loaded after a short task unless the user asks.
Preferred text model when ComfyUI may be used soon.
Use only when ComfyUI is idle or closed.
Queue vision requests while ComfyUI has the turn.
Default embedding model because it has the lowest resource pressure.
Use only for explicit high-quality indexing sessions.

resource_manager.responsibility: Read GPU, ComfyUI, Ollama, turn flags, and queue state before assigning work.

planner.responsibility: Turn a user request into stages, dependencies, and specialist handoffs.

rag_librarian.responsibility: Search workspace documents, cite evidence, and provide source-backed context.

writer.responsibility: Draft, summarize, translate, and polish outputs.

vision_reviewer.responsibility: Inspect screenshots and images, then return concise findings.

comfyui_operator.responsibility: Reserve the GPU for ComfyUI generation and defer local LLM work until release.

thread_templates.title: Manager - routing and queue
thread_templates.purpose: Own the request plan, resource state, and final handoff.

thread_templates.title: Writer - synthesis
thread_templates.purpose: Produce the user-facing answer or artifact.

thread_templates.title: ComfyUI - generation queue
thread_templates.purpose: Track image generation prompts and VRAM reservation.
